prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约15647→13224→12334→9890→11493名。2021至2024年呈持续前移趋势（从15647升至9890），但2025年出现明显后移，较2024年后退约1603名，基准位次约11493名。近5年波动幅度较大，标准差约1912名；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年77人、2022年77人、2023年75人、2024年74人、2025年75人；2026年计划扩至88人，较2025年增加13人，扩招幅度约17.3%。扩招意味着竞争压力有所缓解，位次数字倾向于减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，非985。软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第67名，近年排名在54–67之间波动，整体处于中上水平，办学实力稳定；该校2023年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；2026年声誉数据中该校未单独出现，整体舆情平稳。；第五轮学科评估中，安全科学与工程获评A+（全国顶尖），测绘科学与技术A-，土木工程A-。安全工程为该校王牌专业，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业在2024–2026年均为高热推荐，矿大在上述领域均有招生，可能提升报考热度；土木建筑类专业热度从明显劝退转为分化观望。云南省2026年高考总报名人数约37.79万，较2025年（物理类+历史类约28.57万）大幅增长，按历史比例估算物理类考生约22.9万人，较2025年物理类17.33万人增长约32%，考生规模显著扩大加剧了竞争。；中国矿业大学位于江苏省徐州市，非云南省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招17.3%（缓解竞争）与云南省物理类考生增长约32%（加剧竞争）的双向作用，考生增长幅度显著大于扩招幅度，净效果为竞争加剧。同时计算机/电气等热门专业持续高热吸引更多高分考生报考。在，考虑考生规模大幅增长带来的竞争加剧，适度上调位次。预测2026年最低位次约12838名，区间12338–13338名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、信息安全、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 人工智能
- 电子信息工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 安全科学与工程类（安全工程、消防工程、职业卫生工程、应急技术与管理）
- 机械类（智能制造工程、机械工程）
- 能源动力类（储能科学与工程、能源与动力工程）
- 遥感科学与技术
- 自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 矿业类（智能采矿工程、新能源科学与工程、采矿工程、工业工程）
- 测绘类（测绘工程、地理信息科学）
- 土木类（土木工程、工程管理、建筑环境与能源应用工程）
- 化工与制药类（化学工程与工艺、应用化学、能源化学工程）
- 材料科学与工程
- 地质类（地质工程、资源勘查工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约12838名，区间12338–13338名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如12300名以内）可重点冲击电气工程、计算机类等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如13300名左右）建议以三档优势学科专业为主，兼顾二档中等专业。安全科学与工程（A+）作为矿大王牌，性价比突出，建议重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science/physics category were approximately 15647 → 13224 → 12334 → 9890 → 11493. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (from 15647 to 9890), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift, about 1603 places behind 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 11493. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is large, with a standard deviation of about 1912. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province for science/physics category: 77 in 2021, 77 in 2022, 75 in 2023, 74 in 2024, 75 in 2025; in 2026, the plan expands to 88, an increase of 13 compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 17.3%. Expansion means that competitive pressure is somewhat alleviated, and ranking numbers tend to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, not a 985. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 67th on the main list, fluctuating between 54 and 67 in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level with stable办学 strength; the university's reputation evaluation during the 2023 Gaokao cycle was neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; in 2026 reputation data, the university did not appear separately, and overall public opinion was stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Safety Science and Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, and Civil Engineering A-. Safety Engineering is the university's flagship major, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication and other majors were highly recommended in 2024–2026. The university enrolls in the above fields, which may increase application popularity; the popularity of civil engineering and architecture majors has shifted from obvious discouragement to differentiated观望. The total number of Gaokao registrants in Yunnan Province in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase from 2025 (physics category + history category about 285,700). Estimated by historical proportion, physics category candidates are about 229,000, an increase of about 32% from 173,300 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate scale and intensifying competition. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou City, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Yunnan, with no provincial enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the significant expansion of 17.3% in 2026 (alleviating competition), and the increase of about 32% in physics category candidates in Yunnan Province (intensifying competition), the growth in candidates is significantly greater than the expansion rate, with the net effect being intensified competition. At the same time, popular majors such as computer science/electrical engineering continue to be hot, attracting more high-scoring candidates to apply. Considering the intensified competition due to the significant increase in candidate scale, moderately raise the ranking. Predict the lowest ranking in 2026 to be about 12838, with a range of 12338–13338.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, Occupational Health Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Mechanical Engineering (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Engineering)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mining Engineering (Intelligent Mining Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Mining Engineering, Industrial Engineering)
- Surveying and Mapping Engineering (Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Geographic Information Science)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Engineering Management, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemical Engineering)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Geology (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 12838, range 12338–13338. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 for冲刺, and Tier 3 as safety. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12300) can focus on冲击 Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; candidates near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 13300) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 advantageous discipline majors, while兼顾 Tier 2 medium majors. Safety Science and Engineering (A+), as the university's flagship, offers outstanding cost-effectiveness and is highly recommended for attention.
